description:
| Parameter | Direction | Purpose                        |
| --------- | --------- | ------------------------------ |
| **-g**    | R1 5' end | Front adapter for R1           |
| **-a**    | R1 3' end | Back (trailing) adapter for R1 |
| **-G**    | R2 5' end | Front adapter for R2           |
| **-A**    | R2 3' end | Back (trailing) adapter for R2 |
